top_signals.title: Philippine leader’s state visit to Japan to focus on shoring up defense ties
top_signals.summary: Energy security will also be on the agenda for Philippine President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.'s trip to Tokyo — the first state visit by the country's leader in more than a decade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
